CustomField.formula: If(IsBlank(leaseworks__Final_TAT__c),null,if(IsBlank(leaseworks__Initial_TAT__c), null, if( leaseworks__Final_TAT__c > leaseworks__Initial_TAT__c , IMAGE('/img/samples/flag_red.gif', 'Red Flag'),IMAGE('/img/samples/flag_green.gif','Green Flag'))))
CustomField.label: TAT Impact?
